lines.speaker: Gnormadium Avlafrim
lines.text: Hello! Don't get in the way around here, we've got a lot of work to do!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there, what are you working on?

lines.speaker: Gnormadium Avlafrim
lines.text: Well, it's quite exciting... we're extending the glider network to include the Feldip Hills so that people can come and look at these curious ogres.

lines.speaker: Gnormadium Avlafrim
lines.text: They are impressive creatures aren't they - quite mystified they are by the technology we gnomes have invented.

lines.speaker: Gnormadium Avlafrim
lines.text: Well, people will be able to visit this area, once construction has finished, by using the most advanced network of glider routes in the whole of Gielinor... in fact, the only network of glider routes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything I can do?

lines.speaker: Gnormadium Avlafrim
lines.text: Not really, I'm afraid, it's probably all far too technical for someone like you.

lines.speaker: Gnormadium Avlafrim
lines.text: Getting there now, thanks to your help!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I take a flight in the glider?

lines.speaker: Gnormadium Avlafrim
lines.text: Oh my! I've had nothing to eat or drink but chompy birds and smelly water for days. Thank you.

lines.speaker: Gnormadium Avlafrim
lines.text: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
